creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: marino
Date: Fri Jul 12 15:52:07 2013
New Revision: 322845
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322845

Log:
  sysutils/ckl BROKEN: unfetchable due to MASTER_SITES redirection
  
  PR:		ports/179650
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (>3 weeks), bapt (mentor)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/ckl/Makefile

Modified: head/sysutils/ckl/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ckl/Makefile	Fri Jul 12 15:51:30 2013	(r322844)
+++ head/sysutils/ckl/Makefile	Fri Jul 12 15:52:07 2013	(r322845)
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ DISTNAME=	ckl-${PORTVERSION}
 MAINTAINER=	kami@k5-storitve.net
 COMMENT=	A command line tool for noting when something was changed on a machine
 
+BROKEN=		unfetchable, MASTER_SITES redirects to Rackspace
 LIB_DEPENDS=	curl:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
 
 USE_SCONS=	yes
